usage: Used to treat mild to moderate pain and reduce fever. Effective for headache, body pain, toothache, and common cold symptoms.
dosageInfo: Adults: 500-1000mg every 4-6 hours. Maximum 4000mg per day. Children: As per weight and age (consult doctor).
sideEffects: Rarely causes side effects at recommended doses
precautions: Check other medicines for paracetamol content
missedDoseAdvice: Take as soon as you remember. Skip if close to next dose. Do not double dose.
storageInfo: Store below 30°C in a dry place. Keep away from children.

usage: Used for pain, inflammation, and fever. Effective for headache, dental pain, muscle pain, arthritis, and menstrual cramps.
dosageInfo: Adults: 200-400mg every 4-6 hours. Maximum 1200mg per day (OTC). Take with food.
missedDoseAdvice: Take as soon as remembered. Skip if almost time for next dose.
storageInfo: Store at room temperature. Keep away from moisture.

usage: Broad-spectrum antibiotic for bacterial infections including ear infections, throat infections, urinary tract infections, and skin infections.
dosageInfo: Adults: 250-500mg every 8 hours. Complete full course (usually 5-7 days). Children: As per weight.
precautions: Complete full course even if feeling better
May reduce effectiveness of birth control
missedDoseAdvice: Take as soon as remembered. If close to next dose, skip and continue regular schedule. Never double dose.
storageInfo: Store below 25°C. Reconstituted suspension: refrigerate and use within 14 days.

usage: Used for respiratory infections, ear infections, skin infections, and sexually transmitted infections. Often prescribed as a 3-day or 5-day course.
dosageInfo: Adults: 500mg on day 1, then 250mg daily for 4 more days. Or 500mg daily for 3 days.
precautions: Take 1 hour before or 2 hours after meals
May cause heart rhythm issues in some patients
missedDoseAdvice: Take as soon as remembered. Do not double dose. Complete the full course.
storageInfo: Store below 30°C in a dry place.

usage: First-line treatment for Type 2 diabetes. Helps control blood sugar levels by improving insulin sensitivity and reducing glucose production.
dosageInfo: Adults: Start 500mg once or twice daily with meals. Maximum 2000-2500mg per day. Dose adjusted by doctor.
precautions: Take with meals to reduce stomach upset
Stop before CT scan with contrast dye
missedDoseAdvice: Take with next meal. Do not double dose. Continue regular schedule.
storageInfo: Store below 30°C. Keep in original packaging.

usage: Used to treat high blood pressure and chest pain (angina). Helps relax blood vessels so blood can flow more easily.
dosageInfo: Adults: 50mg once daily. Maximum 10mg once daily. Take at the same time each day.
missedDoseAdvice: Take as soon as remembered. If almost time for next dose, skip missed dose. Never double dose.
storageInfo: Store below 30°C. Protect from light and moisture.

usage: Used to prevent and treat dehydration caused by diarrhea, vomiting, excessive sweating, or fever. Essential for children with diarrhea.
dosageInfo: Dissolve 1 sachet in 1 litre of clean drinking water. Sip frequently. Children: As much as tolerated.
precautions: Use clean boiled or filtered water
Do not add sugar or salt
missedDoseAdvice: Not applicable. Drink as needed for hydration.
storageInfo: Store in a cool dry place. Use reconstituted solution within 24 hours.

usage: Used for allergic conditions including hay fever, allergic rhinitis, hives, and itching. Provides 24-hour relief from allergy symptoms.
dosageInfo: Adults: 10mg once daily. Children 6-12: 5mg once or twice daily. Can be taken with or without food.
missedDoseAdvice: Take as soon as remembered. Skip if close to next dose time.
storageInfo: Store below 30°C. Keep away from moisture.

usage: Reduces stomach acid production. Used for acidity, gastric ulcers, acid reflux (GERD), and heartburn.
dosageInfo: Adults: 20mg once daily before breakfast. For ulcers: 20mg twice daily. Course: 2-8 weeks.
precautions: Long-term use may affect calcium absorption
missedDoseAdvice: Take as soon as remembered before next meal. Skip if almost time for next dose.
storageInfo: Store below 25°C. Keep in original blister pack.

usage: Used for bacterial and parasitic infections including amoebiasis, giardiasis, dental infections, and certain types of diarrhea.
dosageInfo: Adults: 400mg three times daily for 5-7 days. Children: As per body weight. Take with food.
precautions: Absolutely avoid alcohol during and 48 hours after treatment
missedDoseAdvice: Take as soon as remembered. If close to next dose, skip. Complete full course.
storageInfo: Store below 25°C. Protect from light.

usage: Quick-relief inhaler for asthma and COPD. Relaxes airways muscles to relieve wheezing, shortness of breath, and chest tightness.
dosageInfo: Inhaler: 1-2 puffs every 4-6 hours as needed. Nebulizer: As prescribed. Shake well before use.
precautions: If using more than 2 times per week, see doctor
missedDoseAdvice: Use only when needed. Do not use more than prescribed.
storageInfo: Store below 30°C. Do not puncture or expose to heat. Keep away from flames.

usage: Used to prevent and treat iron deficiency anemia and folic acid deficiency. Essential during pregnancy for maternal and fetal health.
dosageInfo: Adults: 1 tablet daily. Pregnant women: As prescribed (usually 1 tablet daily). Take on empty stomach with vitamin C for better absorption.
precautions: Take on empty stomach or with orange juice
missedDoseAdvice: Take as soon as remembered. Skip if close to next dose. Do not double.
storageInfo: Store below 30°C. Keep away from moisture and children.

usage: Provides quick relief from acidity, heartburn, stomach upset, and gas. Neutralizes stomach acid directly.
dosageInfo: Adults: 10-20ml or 1-2 tablets after meals and at bedtime. Chew tablets before swallowing.
precautions: Do not use for more than 2 weeks without doctor advice
missedDoseAdvice: Take when symptoms occur. Not a scheduled medication.
storageInfo: Store below 30°C. Shake well before use. Do not freeze.

usage: Used for moderate to severe pain, inflammation, and swelling. Effective for arthritis, muscle pain, dental pain, and post-operative pain.
dosageInfo: Adults: 50mg 2-3 times daily. Take with food. Gel: Apply thin layer to affected area 3-4 times daily.
precautions: Not for long-term use without supervision
missedDoseAdvice: Take with next meal. Do not double dose.
storageInfo: Store below 30°C. Protect from moisture.

usage: Used for prevention and treatment of malaria (P. vivax and sensitive P. falciparum). Also used in some autoimmune conditions.
dosageInfo: Treatment: 600mg initial, then 300mg at 6, 24, and 48 hours. Prevention: 300mg weekly. As prescribed by doctor.
precautions: Regular eye check-ups if long-term use
Keep away from children (toxic in overdose)
missedDoseAdvice: Take as soon as remembered. Complete the full prescribed course.
storageInfo: Store below 30°C. Protect from light. Keep away from children.

usage: Used for treatment of intestinal worm infections including roundworm, hookworm, whipworm, and tapeworm.
dosageInfo: Adults: 400mg single dose for common worms. For some infections, 400mg twice daily for 3 days. Children above 2: Same dose.
precautions: Take with food for better absorption
Deworming recommended every 6 months in endemic areas
missedDoseAdvice: Usually a single dose. If on multi-day course, take as soon as remembered.
storageInfo: Store below 30°C. Chewable tablets can be crushed.

usage: Reduces stomach acid production. Used for peptic ulcer, acid reflux, and prevention of stress ulcers. Alternative to ranitidine.
dosageInfo: Adults: 20mg twice daily or 40mg at bedtime. For maintenance: 20mg at bedtime.
precautions: May mask symptoms of stomach cancer
Use lower dose in kidney disease
missedDoseAdvice: Take as soon as remembered. Skip if close to next dose.
storageInfo: Store below 30°C. Protect from moisture.

usage: Nutritional supplement providing essential vitamins and minerals. Used to prevent nutritional deficiencies, support immunity, and improve overall health.
dosageInfo: Adults: 1 tablet/capsule daily after food. As per product instructions.
precautions: Not a substitute for balanced diet
missedDoseAdvice: Take when remembered. Skip if close to next day's dose.
storageInfo: Store below 30°C. Keep away from moisture and sunlight.

usage: Used to prevent and treat nausea and vomiting caused by surgery, chemotherapy, or gastroenteritis.
dosageInfo: Adults: 4-8mg every 8 hours. Can be taken orally or as mouth-dissolving tablet. Children: As per weight.
precautions: May cause QT prolongation in heart patients
Use with caution in liver disease
Dissolving tablets: place on tongue, let dissolve
missedDoseAdvice: Take as soon as remembered if still feeling nauseous. Skip if close to next dose.
storageInfo: Store below 30°C. Keep mouth-dissolving tablets in blister until use.

usage: Used to treat high blood pressure. Also protects kidneys in diabetic patients. Helps prevent stroke.
dosageInfo: Adults: 50mg once daily. May increase to 100mg. Take at the same time each day.
missedDoseAdvice: Take as soon as remembered. Skip if close to next dose. Never double dose.
storageInfo: Store below 30°C. Protect from light and moisture.

usage: Used to lower cholesterol and triglyceride levels. Reduces risk of heart attack and stroke in patients with cardiovascular risk.
dosageInfo: Adults: 10-20mg once daily at bedtime. Maximum 80mg. Dose adjusted based on cholesterol levels.
precautions: Take at bedtime for best effect
missedDoseAdvice: Take as soon as remembered. Skip if almost time for next dose.
storageInfo: Store below 30°C. Protect from moisture and light.

usage: Used as a blood thinner to prevent blood clots and reduce the risk of heart attacks and strokes. Taken immediately during chest pain (suspected heart attack).
dosageInfo: Emergency Dose for Chest Pain: 150-300mg chewed immediately (not swallowed whole) to speed up absorption. Daily prevention: 75-150mg once daily.
precautions: Chew the tablet if experiencing chest pain/heart attack symptoms. Do not take on an empty stomach for daily use. Avoid with active stomach ulcers or severe bleeding disorders. Consult doctor immediately.
missedDoseAdvice: Take as soon as remembered. Skip if close to next dose.
storageInfo: Store below 25°C in a dry place.

usage: Used to prevent or relieve chest pain (angina) caused by heart disease. Relaxes blood vessels to increase blood flow to the heart.
dosageInfo: Angina relief: 5-10mg placed under the tongue (sublingual) for immediate action. Do not swallow.
precautions: Must be placed under the tongue for rapid action. Do not take with erectile dysfunction medicines (Sildenafil/Tadalafil) as it causes life-threatening low blood pressure.
missedDoseAdvice: Use only when chest pain occurs, or as prescribed.
storageInfo: Store in a tight container away from moisture.
